description.value:
You unleash your contained anger at a situation. Your size increases to Large, and you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1}. You gain a +1 status bonus to melee damage. This doesn't change your Speed, reach, or other statistics except as noted here. Your worn equipment automatically resizes to suit your new form, though it immediately returns to its original size if it leaves your possession. These effects last for 1 round. You can Sustain for up to 10 minutes, though you must then spend at least 10 minutes in your natural form before using Unleashed Anger again.

Special If you're a red-blooded madrosarai, you can use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Controlled Rage] as a free action right after using Unleashed Anger. If you do, you gain a +2 status bonus to melee damage.
